meaning: n.用贝壳或贝壳状容器盛的菜
examples: The LTBB is the third tribe to recognize same-sex marriages, after the Coquille Tribe of Oregon and the Suquamish Tribe of Washington.
Plummer and his wife Elaine Taylor own two condos at La Coquille Club Villas in nearby Manalapan since 1999, according to records.
Interestingly enough, it is the exact opposite on the French market, where the large variety, called coquille Saint-Jacques, is more prized than the smaller petoncle.
